name: Auto Extract Bill No
script:
# The system automatically knows 'doc' is the current document
if doc.name:
    # Split the ID by the hyphen and grab the very last part
    # Example: "SAL-QTN-2026-00001" becomes "00001"
    doc.custom_bill_no = doc.name.split('-')[3]

name: Sales Order Auto Extract Bill No
Rajasthan Cutting Kota Area API
